mapper.select: SELECT id, company_name, company_code, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, address, status, admin_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM t_company WHERE company_code = #{companyCode}

SELECT id, company_name, company_code, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, address, status, admin_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM t_company WHERE 1=1
AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR company_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
